---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Use case

<!--
  Describe the problem you're trying to solve and the context in which you'd use this feature.
  "I want X" is less useful than "I'm building Y and I need X because Z."
-->

## Proposed solution

How you'd expect the feature to work — API shape, option name, behaviour, etc. Rough sketches or pseudocode are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches that might solve the problem differently.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — links to similar features in other libraries, screenshots, mockups, etc.
